identity_drift.logo_mutation: The logo text or icon was hallucinated, simplified, or altered.
identity_drift.packaging_drift: The shape, color, or texture of the product packaging changed significantly.
identity_drift.color_inaccuracy: The product's primary colors were not preserved.
identity_drift.shape_distortion: The geometric proportions of the product were warped.

visual_artifacts.hallucinated_objects: The AI added extra, unrequested props that distract from the main subject.
visual_artifacts.merging_errors: The product appears to blend or 'melt' into the background.
visual_artifacts.distorted_text: Random text or gibberish appeared in the background or on props.

commercial_failures.cluttered_background: The background is too busy for Shopee/mobile readability.
commercial_failures.unnatural_lighting: Lighting feels artificial or doesn't match the environment.
commercial_failures.poor_framing: The product is too small or improperly cropped.
